lessons.title: Plan Resource Requirements
lessons.content_md:
Familiarize yourself with the various configuration options for a new Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL account.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/plan-resource-requirements/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Configure Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
lessons.content_md:
Select between the various throughput offerings in Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-azure-cosmos-db-sql-api/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Configure Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL

lessons.title: Move data into and out of Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
lessons.content_md:
Migrate data into and out of Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL using Azure services and open-source solutions.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/move-data-azure-cosmos-db-sql-api/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Move data into and out of Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Plan and implement Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Plan and implement Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
